message:
fix(ci): patch asupersync to git rev with macOS/Windows cross-platform fixes

The published asupersync 0.1.0 on crates.io has compilation errors on:
- macOS: libc::cmsghdr.cmsg_len is u32 (not usize), causing type mismatches
- Windows: reactor::windows submodule can't resolve parent types

This patches to git rev 673cf66 which fixes both issues. Remove this
patch when asupersync 0.1.1 is published to crates.io.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -166,7 +166,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "objc2-foundation",
  "parking_lot",
  "percent-encoding",
- "windows-sys 0.60.2",
+ "windows-sys 0.59.0",
  "x11rb",
 ]
 
@@ -263,9 +263,8 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "asupersync"
-version = "0.1.0"
-source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "45551c816d1bb377e94e2633e48e6ab3cedfba821fa1d0eee52f1f2164b17db8"
+version = "0.1.1"
+source = "git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git?rev=673cf66#673cf66d7d316a53f3d7fb08a15999a97221c865"
 dependencies = [
  "base64 0.22.1",
  "bincode",
@@ -287,6 +286,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "serde_json",
  "sha1",
  "slab",

  "tempfile",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
@@ -1348,7 +1348,7 @@ dependencies = [

- "windows-sys 0.61.2",

 ]

+ "windows-sys 0.59.0",
